name: Assumptions
description: The editable inputs that drive the whole model. Change a value here and the Projections recompute.

rows.title: Launch price
rows.notes: Single plan, billed monthly. Benchmarked against the 9 USD–15 USD band most consumer meal-planning apps sit in.

rows.title: Monthly growth rate
rows.notes: Gross new customers added each month as a share of last month's base. 0.08 = 8%. Driven mostly by referrals and content.

rows.title: Monthly churn
rows.notes: Share of customers who cancel each month. 0.03 = 3%, healthy for a habit-forming consumer subscription.

rows.title: Starting customers
rows.notes: Paying subscribers carried over from the closed beta at the start of Month 1 (January 2026).

rows.title: CAC
rows.notes: Fully-loaded cost to acquire one new paying customer across all channels. Payback lands inside four months at the launch price.

rows.title: Gross margin
rows.notes: Revenue left after hosting, payment fees, and recipe-content licensing. 0.85 = 85%, typical for a software subscription.
